story.text:
# 🧮 The Conjecture Register

The living register of the privacy-value model — 96 conjectures (C1–C96) across eight bands. Numbers are never reassigned; each page is forkable. Source of truth: `agentprivacy-docs/research/CONJECTURE_REGISTER_V6.md`.

## Band I · V1–V5.3 core

- [[Conjecture C1]] — Golden ratio φ is optimal S/M (protect:project) ratio *(open)*
- [[Conjecture C2]] — A(τ) should be logarithmic *(open)*
- [[Conjecture C3]] — Edge value is additive *(challenged (path integral replaces))*
- [[Conjecture C4]] — 96 vs 64 discrepancy *(resolved (holographic + algebraic))*
- [[Conjecture C5]] — ~3,000× ZKP reduction *(resolved (strengthened by BRAID + holographic bound))*
- [[Conjecture C6]] — P^1.5 ↔ 96/64 is structural *(convergent)*
- [[Conjecture C7]] — Three-axis separation is multiplicative *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C8]] — BRAID compression reduces R_max *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C9]] — Holographic boundary sufficiency *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C10]] — O(1) shared-parent modifies k *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C11]] — Behavioural density ρ amplifies privacy, indicates maturity *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C12]] — Hexagram encoding is structurally resonant *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C13]] — Bilateral witness as quantum-resistant primitive *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C14]] — Φ_agent ≅ D₂ₙ dihedral isomorphism *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C15]] — T_∫(π) ≅ UOR resolution pipeline *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C16]] — Topological trust invariants via Betti numbers *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C17]] — Amnesia-enforced separation tighter than policy-enforced *(active)*

## Band II · V6 research series

- [[Conjecture C18]] — Sovereignty path exhibits strange attractor dynamics (λ > 0); dynamical reconstruction ceiling *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C19]] — ρ is Lyapunov divergence accumulated over the walk *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C20]] — Three axes couple as three Lorenz variables *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C21]] — Sovereignty manifold has fractal dimension *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C22]] — Reconstruction cost grows exponentially with EML tree depth *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C23]] — Blade forge grammar isomorphic to restricted EML grammar *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C24]] — Sovereignty computation requires complex intermediates *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C25]] — Minimal EML tree depth is hard floor for compression spectrum *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C26]] — ARCH-1 is canonical form of NAND, EML, succ as co-instances *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C27]] — ρ is the activation mechanism; Ω without ρ is inert *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C28]] — Three ceilings independent because ARCH-1 factors into β / μS / Ω *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C29]] — The Second Person Lift: You := μS.(β ∨ Ω(S,S)) *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C30]] — Trust half-life begins at inscription; decays until renewed *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C31]] — Half-life differs by inscription register (shielded vs transparent) *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C32]] — Productive trust-edges have higher half-life than transactional *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C33]] — Half-lives compose multiplicatively across the three axes *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C34]] — Convergence requires a bijective cap *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C35]] — The wound is where the architectural asymmetry lives *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C36]] — The cap is where the bijection lives or breaks *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C37]] — Convergence is recognition, not coincidence *(active)*

## Band III · Bound Collection (Tomes IV–V)

- [[Conjecture C38]] — Bilateral ARCH-1: Σ_ij := μS.(β_ij ∨ Ω(S_i, S_j)) preserves fixpoint *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C39]] — Kindred-blade as ecosystem-layer primitive *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C40]] — Zcash dual-ledger preserves Eight Cloak Properties *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C41]] — 61.8/38.2 transparent/shielded inscription ratio as cultural norm *(observation)*
- [[Conjecture C42]] — Stake economics generate Sybil resistance ≥ tier accumulation *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C43]] — Per-VRC viewing-key disclosure strictly more private than unscoped *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C44]] — Productive VRC ≈ hash-exchange VRC in trust strength *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C45]] — Four-chain publication beats single-chain reconstruction resistance *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C46]] — Productive trust-edge has higher half-life than transactional *(alias of C32 (restatement; retained for tome continuity))*

## Band IV · Post-V5.4 coherence

- [[Conjecture C47]] — Ages progressively: the dynamical ceiling is a fourth aging category beyond Bakhta's taxonomy *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C48]] — Reconstruct-later threat model isomorphic to Bakhta TM-1 *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C49]] — Behavioural Mosca Inequality binds for long-horizon behavioural evidence *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C50]] — PVM multiplicative gating ≡ Bakhta compositional defense at different substrates *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C51]] — The ⿻ remains max-betweenness across trust-graph evolutions *(occupied)*
- [[Conjecture C52]] — Aether = Quintessence = the Gap *(occupied)*
- [[Conjecture C53]] — Every bnot-pair on the lattice has a mythological reading *(occupied)*
- [[Conjecture C54]] — Phi-Adjacency: bnot-pair disclosure ratios cluster near 1/φ *(occupied)*
- [[Conjecture C55]] — Privacy is the seventh kind of capital, foundationally *(occupied)*

## Band V · City register continuation

- [[Conjecture C56]] — Caduceus as pre-formal dual-agent symbol *(active (renumbered from C50 in Threshold chronicle))*
- [[Conjecture C57]] — Staff-Mage collapse, held open *(observation)*
- [[Conjecture C58]] — Forge(t) ∥ Threshold sibling Swordsman-suppliers *(active (promoted v1.6.0))*
- [[Conjecture C59]] — Create-format as gateway to Mage-tier *(active (renumbered from C49 in Threshold chronicle))*
- [[Conjecture C60]] — Reconstruct-later threat model for behavioural data *(alias of C48 (renumbering eddy: v1.5.0 patch C48 → C60))*
- [[Conjecture C61]] — Behavioural Mosca Inequality (planning bound) *(alias of C49 (renumbering eddy: v1.5.0 patch C49 → C61))*
- [[Conjecture C62]] — Cross-coalition meta-coalition reading *(reserved (v1.5.1, no claim authored))*
- [[Conjecture C63]] — Attentional workshop register, fourth structural class *(active (population-of-one))*
- [[Conjecture C64]] — Listener-discipline as the City's structural seventh tier *(active (population-of-one, v1.7.0))*
- [[Conjecture C65]] — Invitation-posture as fourth tome-posture register *(active (population-of-one, v1.7.1))*
- [[Conjecture C66]] — The City Key is a reading, not an authority *(active)*

## Band VI · Horizon District

- [[Conjecture C67]] — Cryptographic Mosca for the substrate (extends C30 to C33 + C61; C60 is the X-side) *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C68]] — Resource-estimate as durability signal, not attack (e^(−λt) reading) *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C69]] — Held-out gate rejects the tuned claim (nonce-island; C13 at the validation layer) *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C70]] — Crypto-agility as migration readiness (C30 to C33 migration-window Y) *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C71]] — The Horizon Vertex V35 (Protection ∧ Computation ∧ Value) *(active)*

## Band VII · Renumbered research blocks

- [[Conjecture C72]] — Traversal ρ of ARCH-1R/T and activation ρ of ARCH-1 are one operator at two scopes *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C73]] — Terminal-obstruction is a primitive obstruction class; Amnesia Protocol its canonical instance *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C74]] — Latency (ternary 0) has an algebraic signature on the blade lattice *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C75]] — Dependency closure under typed propagation models real cascade; hard-vs-soft is the 0-vs-minus… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C76]] — UOR-relational instantiation (classifying rel(a,b)) strictly more expressive for sovereignty *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C77]] — Bakhta's integrity gap and PVM's scales-vs-hides separation are one object *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C78]] — Specification-intent gap and the irreducible promise are one object, two sides *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C79]] — Shared frontier: recursive proof composition across providers under heterogeneous trust at runt… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C80]] — Bilateral co-signed assumption sets yield strict assurance gain in multi-provider case *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C81]] — Existence-Leak: a ZK proof of feasibility leaks an upper bound on reconstruction difficulty; I(… *(active)*

## Band VIII · Registered during the V6 runs

- [[Conjecture C82]] — The Moving Ceiling: frontier capability growth raises C_S(t) + C_M(t) against fixed archives wi… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C83]] — Compositional Leakage Amplification: policy-only separation compounds toward (2^N − 1)ε with ch… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C84]] — Existence-Leak Discount: every public feasibility attestation discounts the Behavioural Mosca h… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C85]] — Triadic-Constraint Homology (the ARCH-1 bridge, promoted from CM-C47): the three Φ axes and the… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C86]] — Obstruction-Theoretic Amnesia: Grade-2 forgetting = non-vanishing obstruction class to gluing l… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C87]] — The Key Accumulates: the City Key trust recursion admits an IVC realization (Key = accumulator,… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C88]] — The Parity Cube: the stella octangula's two tetrahedra are the even/odd parity classes of the c… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C89]] — The Octahedral Gap: the tetrahedra's intersection (volume 1/6 of the cube) is the geometric loc… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C90]] — The Limitative Inversion: completeness ⇒ Φ → 0 ⇒ collapse is the value-sign reversal of complet… *(observation)*
- [[Conjecture C91]] — Gödel ↔ Φ_agent: zero-memory (Selene) is the Φ_agent instance of Gödel's first theorem; a witne… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C92]] — Tarski ↔ Φ_inference: existence-leak is the Tarski-undefinability instance loading on Φ_inferen… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C93]] — Content-addressed liveness leak: a live content-address is an existence claim about its content… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C94]] — Separation Principle in a Second Substrate: `s ⊥ m | X` realised as a running build on Archon d… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C95]] — The Evidence Graph as the Anti-Score: issuer-attested disclosure — a signed, decomposable evide… *(active)*
- [[Conjecture C96]] — Control-Plane ⊥ Data-Plane: the Sovereign authorizes the rules the Warden enforces; splitting t… *(active)*

---
